scripts.db:up: cd docker && docker compose --env-file .env.docker up -d database
scripts.db:restart: npm run db:down && npm run db:up
scripts.db:shell: cd docker && docker exec -it lastsave-mariadb sh -c "mariadb -u\"$MARIADB_USER\" -p\"$MARIADB_PASSWORD\" \"$MARIADB_DATABASE\""
scripts.db:reset: cd docker && docker compose --env-file .env.docker down -v && docker compose --env-file .env.docker up -d database
